steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The colon after the blank signals that the rest of the sentence defines the blank: "a constantly evolving network of channels and strips of land that change in size and shape." The word must mean constantly changing or active.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — immutable: means unchanging or permanent. The delta constantly evolves — direct contradiction. ✗
  • Choice B — unrivaled: means having no equal. The passage never compares the delta to other deltas. ✗
  • Choice C — sustainable: means able to be maintained long-term. The passage describes physical transformation, not environmental durability. ✗
  • Choice D — dynamic: means characterized by constant change and activity. Substituting: "the Danube River delta is dynamic: it is a constantly evolving network…" — the colon definition confirms it exactly. ✓
D is correct.
